focus: Building Courtana, shipping this personal OS in public, and looking for the right GTM/partnership seat at a frontier AI lab.

currently.title: Courtana
currently.detail: AI on the pickleball court — live video, instant highlights, coaching. The Peak Pickleball pilot is mid-flight.

currently.title: This site
currently.detail: A dynamic résumé that demonstrates the claim instead of asserting it. Shipped in the open, improving most weeks.

currently.title: The next seat
currently.detail: Talking to frontier labs about GTM & partnership roles. I sell the technology and I build with it daily.

shipped.title: bricker-os terminal went live
shipped.detail: Ask it anything — answered in real time by an LLM grounded in my own corpus.

shipped.title: Published the Google partnership case study
shipped.detail: The full story of closing Google as a sub-one-year-old startup — and the flywheel after.

shipped.title: Courtana × Peak Pickleball pilot running
shipped.detail: 8-week venue pilot: camera analytics, live dashboards, post-pilot subscription model.

shipped.title: VibeCo simulator
shipped.detail: An 11-agent product simulator — idea to brief to working app. 40+ apps came out of that motion.
